Pedagogical Framework Description: A hierarchical framework for moving learners from foundational recall toward higher order creation
Pedagogical Elements: Remember | Understand | Apply | Analyze | Evaluate | Create

Pedagogical Framework Description: An inquiry-based instructional sequence that moves learners through engagement exploration explanation elaboration and evaluation
A guided inquiry framework that gradually reduces support as learners build understanding
Pedagogical Elements: Activate Prior Knowledge | Guided Investigation | Concept Explanation | Independent Practice | Reflection

Pedagogical Framework Description: A teaching framework that shifts responsibility from instructor modeling to learner independence
Pedagogical Elements: I Do | We Do | You Do Together | You Do Independently

Pedagogical Framework Description: A learner-centered framework organized around investigating and resolving an authentic problem
Pedagogical Elements: Problem Presentation | Problem Analysis | Self Directed Learning | Solution Development | Presentation and Reflection

Pedagogical Framework Description: A framework in which learners practice receive feedback and continue until defined mastery criteria are met
Pedagogical Elements: Initial Instruction | Formative Check | Corrective Support | Reassessment | Enrichment

Pedagogical Framework Description: A cyclical framework that moves learners from concrete experience through reflection conceptualization and experimentation
Pedagogical Elements: Concrete Experience | Reflective Observation | Abstract Conceptualization | Active Experimentation

Pedagogical Framework Description: A design framework for reducing learning barriers through varied engagement representation and expression options
Pedagogical Elements: Engagement Options | Representation Options | Action and Expression Options

Pedagogical Framework Description: A collaborative learning framework that organizes educational experience through social cognitive and teaching presence
Pedagogical Elements: Social Presence | Cognitive Presence | Teaching Presence

Pedagogical Framework Description: A framework that makes expert practice visible and then shifts learners toward independent strategic performance
Pedagogical Elements: Modeling | Coaching | Scaffolding | Articulation | Reflection | Exploration

Pedagogical Framework Description: A framework for helping learners set goals plan monitor evaluate and adjust their own learning strategies
Pedagogical Elements: Goal Setting | Strategic Planning | Self Monitoring | Self Evaluation | Strategy Adjustment

Pedagogical Framework Description: A framework for shared inquiry where learners frame problems negotiate meaning construct artifacts and reflect together
Pedagogical Elements: Shared Problem Framing | Peer Negotiation | Joint Construction | Group Reflection

Pedagogical Framework Description: A framework centered on sustained inquiry that leads to critique revision and a public learning product
Pedagogical Elements: Driving Question | Sustained Inquiry | Critique and Revision | Public Product | Project Reflection

Pedagogical Framework Description: A framework for surfacing prior conceptions creating productive conflict and reconstructing understanding for transfer
Pedagogical Elements: Prior Conception Elicitation | Cognitive Conflict | Concept Reconstruction | Transfer Check
